title: Detroit Connection Pt. 3: Last Man Standing (Demetrius Holloway)
original_title: Detroit Connection Pt. 3: Last Man Standing (Demetrius Holloway)
overview: A reputed Detroit drug kingpin who once staged his own kidnapping and assassination to disappear for several months, was killed.
